title: okipiak's Express - Wathe
description: An addon for Wathe - adds new roles and modifiers.
body:
okipiak's Express is an addon for Wathe, created by doctor4t.

🚂 Okipiak's Express 🗡️

An addon for Wathe - adds new roles, and modifiers.

Links

- 💾 GitHub Repository (in progress) – source code. - 🪲 Issues – report bugs.

Other Changes

Killer Reward

After any killer role completes a fake task, 5 coins are given to all alive killers.

New Modifiers

Mute

The Mute cannot communicate with others using voicechat, but they spawn with eight notes. They can hear others very well though.


Paranoid

The Paranoid hears random sounds from time to time.

New Roles

Medical

This is a civilian role. The Medical can tag a player, and said player will be saved after death, no matter the role they had. After tagged person dies, and is revived, the Medical is poisoned, and dies after 30 seconds.


Gravedigger

This is a civilian role. The Gravedigger spawns with the Mourning Blade. They can knock somebody out, two times with said weapon. They can also see player bodies though walls, if the body is in 5 block square from them.


Athlete

This is a civilian role. The Athlete runs faster than any other role, making escapes much easier.


Timekeeper

This is a civilian role. The Timekeeper sees the timer.


Vagrant

This is a civilian role. The Vagrant doesn't have to do any tasks.

Planned Features:

- Server and Client side config - New Roles - New Modifiers - More languages support
